name: Quiche Lorraine
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the cooked bacon, cheese, and onion evenly over the bottom of the pre-baked pie shell.
2. In a large bowl, beat together the eggs, half and half, salt, nutmeg, and cayenne until well combined.
3. Pour the egg mixture into the prepared pie shell.
4. Place the dish in a preheated oven set to 425°F (220°C) and bake for 15 minutes on the bottom shelf.
5. Reduce the temperature to 325°F (165°C) and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center of the quiche comes out clean.
6. Remove from the oven and let stand for 10 minutes before cutting and serving at room temperature or warmed.
